case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. SABRINA PALMA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT PALMA, SABRINA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO SEP-15-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PER PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT IS NOW ON A PAYMENT PLAN. APEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-19-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PALMA, SABRINA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALMA, SABRINA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,085.50, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
